// Generated by github.com/romshark/datapages. DO NOT EDIT.

// Package action provides generators for datastar action hypertext references.
// These references must be used in the templates.
package action

import (
	"strconv"
	"strings"
)

// POSTPageIndexSetCount references /set-count/
func POSTPageIndexSetCount(query QueryPOSTPageIndexSetCount) string {
	var (
		countStr string
	)

	if query.Count != 0 {
		countStr = strconv.FormatUint(uint64(query.Count), 10)
	}

	anyQuery := query.Count != 0

	var b strings.Builder
	l := len("@post('/set-count/") + len("')")
	if anyQuery {
		l += len("?")
	}
	n := 0
	if query.Count != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			l += len("&")
		}
		l += len("count=") + len(countStr)
	}

	b.Grow(l)

	b.WriteString("@post('/set-count/")
	if anyQuery {
		b.WriteString("?")
	}
	n = 0
	if query.Count != 0 {
		if n > 0 {
			b.WriteString("&")
		}
		b.WriteString("count=")
		b.WriteString(countStr)
	}
	b.WriteString("')")

	return b.String()
}

type QueryPOSTPageIndexSetCount struct {
	Count uint32 `query:"count"`
}
